title: microgonium sublimbatum
intro: Microgonium sublimbatum, also known as the umbrella fern, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Microgonium sublimbatum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and promote tissue repair. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices that can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
